Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5C02 "PESKYPAINTER-1000-5C02" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pesky Painter.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1000 which: 1. Copies 1024 bytes of data from $1020 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. Jumps to the entry point at $5C02 (it couldn't use RTS because of the stack being modified)
